meaning: adj.皮的,似皮的,膜状的,小的
examples: He was quite a skinny little boy.
I used to be really, really skinny.
They are very skinny, but they're taller, so you still have a lot of space.
Mimi is a tanned, skinny woman in a floppy hat with a little dog and a fabulous purse.
Those companies that are in trouble are trying to target everybody: young, old, fat, skinny.
